case_title: CREDITORS ADRUSTMENT BUREAU,INC. VS. MK CARRIERS LLC DBA MK CARRIERS, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE ATTORNEYS FEES, INTEREST, AND COSTS IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75700091) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADRUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADRUSTMENT BUREAU,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MK CARRIERS LLC DBA MK CARRIERS, LLC $23,591.35 PRINCIPAL, $2,700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,900.23 INTEREST, $453.38 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,644.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $453.38 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 75700091) AS TO DEFENDANT MK CARRIERS LLC DBA MK CARRIERS, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74112311) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADRUSTMENT BUREAU,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MK CARRIERS LLC DBA MK CARRIERS, LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-2025
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75343327) AS TO DEFENDANT MK CARRIERS LLC DBA MK CARRIERS, LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 74112311) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADRUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 74112311) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADRUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75122305) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADRUSTMENT BUREAU,INC. SERVED NOV-05-2024, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT MK CARRIERS LLC DBA MK CARRIERS, LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 AND ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75700091) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADRUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75700091) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
